hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_name' | xargs -I {} osascript -e 'display notification "Waiting for your approval" with title "Permission needed: {}"' 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.task.subject // .task_id // "Task"' | xargs -I {} osascript -e 'display notification "Task done" with title "{}"' 2>/dev/null || true
